aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation but lacks AI-specific optimizations that would make it more likely to be cited by AI assistants. With targeted improvements, it can increase visibility in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to leverage existing FAQ content.
Optimize GBP posts with conversational keywords and AI-friendly content.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more frequent posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent GBP posts or updates.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is excellent with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for maintenance tips or repair guides.
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed properties.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to capture AI attention for common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, years of experience, and customer testimonials to establish authority in AI search.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimizations, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their strong GBP rating and customer reviews are not being fully leveraged in AI search due to lack of structured data.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, GBP optimization, and conversational content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors who optimize for AI are already capturing market share. Act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Above & Beyond A/C & Heat
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to increase your visibility with AI search.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven search.
